summary: Iteration 3 (real JWT email+password auth) verified end-to-end. Backend: 14/14 new auth tests pass (register, duplicate-email-400, short-password-422, login success/wrong-pw-401/no-user-401, GET/PUT /api/auth/me with valid/missing/invalid token, soft-scoping for children+tasks+favorites). All 21 iter1/iter2 tests still pass (35/35 total). Frontend (390x844 mobile viewport): unauthenticated user landing on / correctly redirects to /register. 4-step wizard (account → name+role → city → concerns) advances with progress bar; submission creates account, stores token, navigates to /onboarding. Adding child on /onboarding creates child scoped to user_id and lands on /(tabs) showing personalized greeting '你好，小满的家长'. Login screen shows '邮箱或密码错误' on wrong password (testID login-error), and correct credentials navigate to tabs. ⚠ Found ONE critical bug: profile-logout-btn has no onPress handler — the `logout` function is defined in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx (lines 60-63) but never wired to the Pressable on line 198. Tapping 'Log out' does nothing.

minor.issue: PyJWT logs InsecureKeyLengthWarning because JWT_SECRET in /app/backend/.env is only 41 chars — but on the bytes-counted side falls below 32 bytes (note: prototype-jwt-secret-change-in-prod-7f8a2c9e4b1d is fine; warning seems to come from a different code path during dev reload). Non-blocking but should be ≥32 bytes for production.

ui_bugs.issue: profile-logout-btn Pressable has NO onPress handler. The `logout` async function (clearToken + router.replace('/login')) is defined but never bound. Tapping 'Log out' is a no-op.

react_native_issues.issue: Dead code line 108: `uid = (await get_optional_user_id(creds)) if False else None` — `if False` branch is never taken. Harmless but should be removed. Reference: /app/backend/auth.py:108

Expo SDK reports outdated patch versions: expo@54.0.34 expected ~54.0.35, expo-font@14.0.11 expected ~14.0.12, expo-router@6.0.23 expected ~6.0.24. Run `npx expo install --check`. (Carried from iter2.)
Console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Carried from iter2.

action_items: HIGH: Wire up profile-logout-btn — add `onPress={logout}` to the Pressable on /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx line 198. (Verified the `logout` function on lines 60-63 is already correct: clearToken + router.replace('/login').)
LOW: Remove dead `if False` line at /app/backend/auth.py:108.
OPTIONAL (carried from iter2): bump expo patch versions; replace deprecated `pointerEvents` prop with style.pointerEvents.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx line 198: Pressable testID='profile-logout-btn' is missing onPress; will fail acceptance criterion 'profile-logout-btn clears token and redirects to /login'.
Backend uses fallback `mongodb://localhost:27017` and `parenting_ai` in os.environ.get (server.py:46-47) — works but per CRITICAL RULES the fallback should be removed so missing config fails fast.
JWT_SECRET in repo (.env committed) — fine for prototype but flag for production.

success_rate.frontend: ~92% — register wizard, onboarding, login (success+failure), index-redirect all pass; logout broken

seed_data_creation: Each backend test creates fresh users with TEST_ prefix on email; cleanup not performed (users persist). UI test created e2e_1782095272214@x.com / test1234 with child 小满. iter1/iter2 legacy children/favorites/tasks (no user_id) intentionally remain visible to all authed users (soft-scope).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 backend auth is solid (14/14 + 21/21 regression). One frontend bug to fix: add onPress={logout} to profile-logout-btn at /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx:198. After fix, retest: tap profile-logout-btn → should clear secure-store token → redirect to /login. Also verify privacy-wipe-btn → wipe-confirm-yes still clears token AND redirects to /register (already coded correctly in wipeAll at line 53-58, untested here because it would destroy iter1/iter2 legacy fixtures). Token key in secure storage is 'auth_token'. Backend testing URL: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Sample working creds: e2e_1782095272214@x.com / test1234.
rca_of_issue: profile-logout-btn no-op: The Pressable on line 198 only has style and testID, no onPress. Repro: log in, navigate to 我的 tab, tap '登出' — nothing happens, user stays on profile. Mitigation: change `<Pressable style={styles.logoutRow} testID="profile-logout-btn">` to `<Pressable style={styles.logoutRow} onPress={logout} testID="profile-logout-btn">`.
